title: AWS re:Invent 2026 Watch Party
description: Join us as we stream the re:Invent keynotes together, discuss announcements, and network over snacks. Perfect for anyone curious about the latest in AWS.

title: Serverless Workshop: Build with Lambda & API Gateway
description: Hands-on workshop building a serverless URL shortener end-to-end on AWS.
recap: 60 students built a working URL-shortener using Lambda, API Gateway, and DynamoDB. Winning team implemented custom domain routing via Route 53. Huge turnout and great energy.

title: Intro to Cloud Computing — Freshers Session
description: A beginner-friendly intro to cloud computing and the AWS ecosystem, aimed at first-year students.
recap: Kickoff session of the semester. 250+ attendees. Covered cloud basics, shared responsibility model, and a quick AWS Free Tier walkthrough. Q&A ran over by 30 minutes — clearly a lot of interest.
